source: assistant-ui.com/examples (13 examples) + assistant-ui docs Jun 2026 (Thread, Composer, ActionBar, BranchPicker, tools/tool-ui, ui/reasoning, ui/sources, guides/attachments, guides/editing); compared vs NodeRoom src/ui/Chat.tsx + src/app/styles.css
summary: assistant-ui ships the primitive set NodeRoom hand-rolls; P0 gaps are streaming composer, tool-call/trace part rendering, and scroll-anchor correctness.

practices.name: Streaming Composer
practices.adoptForNodeRoom: swap bare input for textarea; Stop button while agent replies

practices.name: Part-stream rendering
practices.adoptForNodeRoom: unify agent bubble and .r-trace as one part stream

practices.name: Empty/Welcome + Suggestions
practices.adoptForNodeRoom: private agent empty state needs scoped pills

practices.name: Edit-creates-branch + BranchPicker
practices.adoptForNodeRoom: private draft as branch of public truth

practices.name: Modal/Sidebar shells
practices.adoptForNodeRoom: private panel = sidebar; modal on mobile
